metadata.name: cumulus-process
metadata.summary: Library for creating Cumulus Process tasks in Python

functions.name: cumulus_process.helpers.upload_files
documentation:
uploads list of local files to a given bucket and prefix

Arguments:
    files: list of file paths
    bucket: name of the bucket to upload the data to
    prefix: the prefix key the appears before the filename

Returns:
    returns a list of s3 uris e.g. s3://example-bucket/my/prefix/filename.txt

documentation:
This property is helps the processing step to distinguish incoming
files from one another

documentation:
This is where you can check the incoming cumulus message
config and input and raise Errors if they are incorrect

methods.name: example.main.Modis.process
documentation:
All subclasses of Process class are expected to implement the
process method. The actual processing goes here. We are only faking
the process in this example

A subclass of Process for processing fake modis products 
This is an example and does not intended for processing MODIS Products
